descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic dimension of crystalline grains in material
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructural parameter controlling mechanical properties

representation.notes: logarithmic scale often used for broad distributions

quality.loss_reason: single scalar cannot capture full distribution
quality.truncation_error: high for multimodal or skewed distributions
quality.notes: mean/median ambiguity, loses distribution shape information

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: angular crystallographic orientation difference across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and material transport properties

representation.notes: bounded between 0 and maximum symmetry angle

quality.loss_reason: histogram binning loses continuous angular information

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of crystallographic preferred orientation in polycrystal
descriptors.rationale: quantifies anisotropy of aggregate crystallographic orientation

representation.notes: unity indicates random texture, higher values stronger

quality.loss_reason: scalar collapses full orientation distribution function
quality.notes: multiple textures yield identical index values

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: characterizes grain shape and processing history

representation.notes: unity for equiaxed grains, increases with elongation

quality.notes: single value ignores distribution across grains

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: influences diffusion pathways and mechanical behavior

representation.notes: inversely proportional to grain size approximation

quality.loss_reason: assumes grain geometry, loses topology information
quality.notes: redundant with grain size for regular morphologies

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total length of dislocations per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: quantifies plastic deformation and hardening state

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution and dislocation type
quality.notes: spatially averaged, loses cell structure information

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic subdivisions within parent grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: indicates recovery and recrystallization evolution stage

representation.notes: binary or multi-class for subgrain morphology types

quality.notes: binary encoding loses quantitative morphological details
